name: Party Time Popcorn Bars
recipeIngredient: 11 oz praline nut mix - honey roasted mixed nuts
1/4 cup mini candy coated chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9x13 inch pan with foil so that the foil extends over the sides; butter the foil.
2. In a large bowl, combine popcorn, nuts, and cranberries; set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt margarine and marshmallows over low heat, stirring constantly.
4. Pour the melted mixture over the popcorn mix; stir well to combine.
5. Press the mixture into the foil-lined pan.
6. Sprinkle with chocolate chips and press lightly.
7. Refrigerate for 1 hour to cool.
8. Remove from the pan by lifting the foil; peel off the foil from the mixture.
9. Cut into 36 bars.
